title: Vintage Tattoo Design Playing Cards
features: Measurements in Cm 6 x 9 x 2 Features A set of retro tattoo playing cards, the ideal gift!
These tattoo playing cards from Something Different are a great way to play games with family and friends

Finished with novelty tattoo designs that you can use within card games, or you could even frame them and use them as decor in your home! The variety of different designs in these playing cards will leave you spoilt for choice, you could even choose one as your next tattoo design! The perfect designs for tattoo lovers out there
Especially for those who like retro tattoo patterns.
Gift these playing cards to a tattoo lover, they would make a lovely birthday gift idea to inspire them for their next tattoo.
